title: dysphania kitiae
intro: Dysphania kitiae, also known as beach morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dysphania kitiae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Dysphania kitiae can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
